policy: Moderate advisories listed here are waived only until expiresAt (UTC). Critical/high must never appear here — use residual-risks.md with security owner sign-off.

exceptions.title: PostCSS XSS via unescaped </style> in CSS stringify
exceptions.mitigation: npm overrides pin postcss@8.5.10 for next nested dep and all consumers; npm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities after lockfile refresh.
exceptions.followUp: When Next ships postcss>=8.5.10 as direct dependency, remove override and re-audit.
exceptions.rejectedFix: npm audit fix --force would install next@9.x (major downgrade) — rejected without compatibility review.
